rulings.Case Title: BALWANT D THAKOR VS. JAMES DENIM PERRY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Records And Register Of Actions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 8, 2011, line 1. Defendant James Perry's Motion to Seal Records and the Register of Actions. Grant, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HONG SANG MARKET, INC. VS. VIVIEN PENG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 8, 2011, line 2. Plaintiff Hong Sang Market, Inc.'s Motion for Attorneys Fees. Grant Attorneys Fees in the amount of $21,669.00. No oppositon filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BURNS DESHON PROPERTIES VS. TERESA ROWE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 8, 2011, line 3. Defendants Teresa Rowe and Kristin Orbin's Demurrer to Compliant. Grant as to three day notice to quit. Deny as to habitual late payment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNA GOLDFELD et al VS. ADRIANNA MARTINS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 8, 2011, line 5. Defendant Adrianna Martins' Demurrer to Complaint. Overruled with five days to answer. = (501/REQ)
